displayTitle: Poe Dameron #13: The Gathering Storm, Part VI
synopsis: It's Terex's army versus Black Squadron — and Black Squadron is outnumbered! Plus, Poe is stranded with only a battle-reluctant commando droid between him and his enemies. Snap Wexley may have a trick or two up his sleeve to help Black Leader fight!
title: Poe Dameron #13: The Gathering Storm, Part VI
